cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is about why Smith became rich. The passage says, "Smith was a landlord. He loved money very much and never gave anything to anybody. Soon he became rich." So the key part here is "never gave anything to anybody," which directly leads to him becoming rich. The question is asking to fill in the blank: "Smith became very rich, because he ___ gave anything to anybody." The options are A) always, B) never, C) often, D) sometimes. Looking at the original text, it clearly states he "never gave anything to anybody," which matches option B. The story
